side_effects: Goldmania foetida is also known as the stinkbird, and like other birds with similar characteristics, it is known to be a carrier of various diseases that can affect humans, such as histoplasmosis and cryptococcosis. intro: Goldmania foetida, also known as the stink turmeric, is a plant species in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) that is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as digestive problems, wounds, and respiratory infections.
